title: Careful Bro
body:
### watch out bro...

![A Reddit screenshot and a photo with text are showing a screenshot from a r/feedthebeast subreddit, where user "idiot770" is looking for a Minecraft mod that would visually warn deaf people about creepers in the game. Underneath, there is a second screenshot from the actual game, where the player is looking at grass and dirt blocks, while four triangles with an exclamation mark are visible on all four sides. The photo also has a picture of a cat in a small square to the left, and a speech bubble coming from the cat that reads "watch out bro...".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cf1fe55c8b5142270f351eb63fe38c8c734965d_0.webp)

probably the best mod to ever exist.
adds a simple 10 block creeper indicator, fully clientside.

fully configurable cat features, it's probably the best fabric mod to have ever fabric'd.
